master.ex: Artificial intelligence is changing our world.

master.ex: Electric cars are better for the environment.

master.ex: We need to find a solution to pollution.

expert.ex: Innovation drives progress.

expert.ex: We need sustainable development.

expert.trans: 使用可生物降解的袋子代替塑料袋。

expert.ex: Energy conservation helps protect the environment.
expert.trans: 节约能源有助于保护环境。

expert.ex: The government is reducing carbon emissions.
expert.trans: 政府正在减少碳排放。

expert.ex: Choose eco-friendly products when possible.
expert.trans: 尽量选择环保产品。

master.ex: Graduation is both exciting and sad.
We said a tearful farewell to our teachers.
master.trans: 我们含泪告别了老师们。

master.ex: Life is a long journey of learning.
master.trans: 人生是一场漫长的学习旅程。

master.ex: I have seen great growth in the past three years.
master.trans: 过去三年我看到了巨大的成长。

master.ex: My middle school years were truly memorable.
master.trans: 我的中学时光真的令人难忘。

master.ex: The future looks promising for our generation.
master.trans: 未来对我们这一代来说充满希望。

master.ex: High school will bring new opportunities.
Face the future with courage and determination.
master.trans: 带着勇气和决心面对未来。

expert.ex: The commencement ceremony was held in the auditorium.
expert.trans: 毕业典礼在大礼堂举行。

expert.ex: Looking at yearbook photos fills me with nostalgia.
expert.trans: 看年鉴照片让我充满怀旧之情。

expert.ex: She has high aspirations for her future career.
expert.trans: 她对未来的职业有很高的抱负。

expert.ex: I will always cherish the memories of my school days.
expert.trans: 我会永远珍惜学生时代的记忆。

expert.ex: A new chapter of life is about to commence.
expert.trans: 人生的新篇章即将开始。
